headline: A Look At Equity Residential (EQR) Valuation After Recent Share Price Gains
summary: Equity Residential (EQR) has been drawing attention after a recent stretch of positive returns, with the stock up about 6% over the past month and roughly 4% in the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Equity Residential. That recent 6.3% 1 month share price return comes on top of a 6.7% year to date share price gain, while the 3 year total shareholder return of 25.7% points to momentum that has been building over a longer horizon.
